browserSearchPath: CLMS Bio-geophysical Parameters, Vegetation, Net/Gross Primary Production
collectionDescription: Provides information about the Gross Primary Production, the total amount of carbon fixed by plants through photosynthesis per unit area and time. Every 10-days, estimates are available at global scale, at a spatial resolution of ~300 m. More information here.

layers.longDescription: Gross Primary Production represents the total amount of carbon fixed by plants through photosynthesis per unit area and time. It is expressed in g C/m²/day.
